validation_rules.requirement: Rutherford Pharmacy fill posted via BCBS-TN
BCBS-TN posts a tier reclassification credit
validation_rules.notes: Post to Interest / Reimbursement income category

validation_rules.requirement: Persona-listed supplements from the WooCommerce supplier
validation_rules.notes: Not medical reimbursement - out of pocket, tracked in Medications and Supplements

validation_rules.requirement: Etsy ergonomic-kitchen shop grip aids and adaptive tools

Requires supporting documentation - see running log

context: Rules used when reconciling BCBS-TN reimbursements against Rutherford Pharmacy fills and supplement / PT-tool receipts.
